steps.action: Create TaskResponse interface and PaginatedTasksResponse type alias
Export PaginatedResponse, TaskResponse, and PaginatedTasksResponse from the shared-types barrel
Create PaginationQueryDto with @IsInt, @Min, @Max, @IsOptional, and @Type(() => Number) decorators for page (default 1, min 1) and limit (default 20, min 1, max 100) query params
Update TasksService.findAll(page, limit) to sort the in-memory store by priority rank, slice with offset = (page-1)*limit, and return { items, total, page, limit }
Update GET /tasks controller handler to accept @Query() PaginationQueryDto and return PaginatedTasksResponse instead of a bare Task array
Add Jest unit tests for default params returning first 20 items, custom page/limit slicing, page beyond total returning empty items with correct total, and total reflecting full store size
Add e2e tests covering no params (200 + defaults), page=2&limit=10 (correct slice), limit=101 (400), page=0 (400), limit=0 (400), and empty store (200 items=[] total=0)
Replace local Task interface with a re-export of TaskResponse from libs/shared-types to align the FE model with the BE and add the priority field
Update TasksApiService.list to accept page and limit parameters and return Observable<PaginatedTasksResponse> using the shared-types contract

Refactor TaskListComponent: remove ngOnInit + manual subscribe; add page and pageSize signals; load data via httpResource() keyed on both signals; bind signals to ?page and ?limit URL query params via withComponentInputBinding(); expose computed hasNext and hasPrev signals
Create task-list template with @for task rows (track task.id), prev/next pagination buttons disabled at boundaries, and a loading state shown while the resource is pending
Add component tests covering initial load renders first page, next-page click increments page signal, prev button is disabled on page 1, and loading indicator is shown while resource is pending
